visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium close-up of a woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink floral blouse against a plain off-white wall. She uses expressive facial expressions and hand gestures, pointing upwards and making a fist to engage the viewer. Bright indoor lighting illuminates her face clearly. (2) The woman holds up two rectangular product boxes, one bright yellow and one vibrant red, showcasing the brand Phytics. The camera remains static while she brings the items closer to the lens. High-contrast overlays and colorful graphics appear periodically to highlight key selling points. (3) The scene transitions to a close-up of the woman's hands removing a white capsule from a silver blister pack. She then takes the capsule and drinks from a white mug with gold trim. The setting remains the same, maintaining a consistent, clean, and personal indoor aesthetic. (4) A close-up shot shows hands splitting a white capsule over a metal dish, releasing fine white powder. This is followed by a demonstration where she pours a pink powder from a red sachet directly into her mouth. The lighting is bright and professional, emphasizing the product's texture. (5) The woman displays a green gift box and pulls out a small yellow packet featuring a cartoon character. She opens the packet and eats a gummy inside, smiling at the camera. The video ends with a montage of her holding all the featured products while graphics indicate promotional offers.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓國女生親自提醒！ 台灣女生Checklist. [Variety]: 🇰🇷 ✅. (2) [Subtitle]: 台灣女生中. (3) [Subtitle]: 如果你有以上其中一種情況. (4) [Subtitle]: 一定要收藏這個Reels喔. (5) [Subtitle]: checklist 平常很難上廁所. [Variety]: 💩. (6) [Subtitle]: checklist 私密處會有腥味. [Variety]: 🤢. (7) [Subtitle]: checklist 有時候分泌物會變多！！. (8) [Subtitle]: 建議試試 韓國女生的解決法. [Variety]: 🇰🇷. (9) [Subtitle]: 每天服用韓國的女性益生菌 必多提斯. (10) [Subtitle]: 這個在OLIVE YOUNG 熱銷第一. [Variety]: 🔥. (11) [Subtitle]: 如果想要全台最低價連結的話. (12) [Subtitle]: 記得把影片看到最後！！. (13) [Subtitle]: 女性專用「小黃盒」 吃法很簡單！. (14) [Subtitle]: 1天1粒用水吞即可. (15) [Subtitle]: 很好吞服 一盒裡面有30粒. (16) [Subtitle]: 其實對女生來說 吃女性專用益生菌 當然會更好喔. [Variety]: 💖. (17) [Subtitle]: 分泌物多、癢、菌群不平衡的時候 可以1天吃2粒. [Variety]: 🧡. (18) [Subtitle]: 生活品質升級超級多！. (19) [Subtitle]: 有吃跟沒吃，差別真的很大！！. (20) [Subtitle]: 它是由藥劑師團隊研發的. [Logo]: 活力腸胃、自信炫腹. (21) [Subtitle]: 選用韓國專利菌株MB01. (22) [Subtitle]: 尤其專為亞洲女性設計. [Variety]: 💖. (23) [Subtitle]: 300億益生菌投入 確保30億活菌存活喔！. (24) [Subtitle]: 如果正在飲食管理的話 也可以吃小紅盒！. (25) [Subtitle]: 這個非常好！. (26) [Subtitle]: 輕盈管理「小紅盒」 飯前一包1天2包. (27) [Subtitle]: 益生菌 + 輕盈管理. [Variety]: ⭐ ⭐. (28) [Subtitle]: 台灣蝦皮銷量 超過4萬盒. [Variety]: 🔥. (29) [Subtitle]: 這次我有拿到 全台最低價. (30) [Subtitle]: 現在「買三盒」 ＋贈1盒. (31) [Subtitle]: 想要優惠團購連結的人 記得現在底下留言. (32) [Subtitle]: 然後先註冊EZ Way海關做認證喔. (33) [Subtitle]: 這次一些套組贈送 超可愛的維他命軟糖. (34) [Subtitle]: 趕快去下單吧～. [Variety]: 😆 💖 💖. (35) [Subtitle]: (猛吃😂😂😂).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking, 1 male pharmacist in a static photo overlay.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark wavy hair, wearing a pink floral v-neck blouse with ruffles.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist indoor setting with a plain off-white wall, typical of a home studio for social media content.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female narration begins immediately alongside a fast-tempo electronic pop BGM with a strong, driving beat. A distinct 'pop' sound effect punctuates the appearance of the first title card. The voice exhibits high arousal and clear articulation, characteristic of a professional social media presenter. (2) As the narrator lists health concerns, a sharp 'ding' sound effect is heard for each checkmark appearing on screen. The BGM maintains its upbeat energy, while the vocal intensity remains high and persuasive. Ambient noise is minimal, suggesting a controlled studio or indoor recording environment. (3) The narration continues with a slightly more informative tone as she introduces the products. A 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a transition to a product shot. The BGM remains constant in the background, providing a vibrant and upbeat acoustic floor that matches the speaker's enthusiasm. (4) A soft 'gulping' or liquid-swallowing sound is heard as the woman drinks water. The narrator's speech rate slows slightly to emphasize the ease of use. The BGM's synth textures remain prominent, ensuring there are no moments of dead air in the master mix. (5) The sound of a plastic sachet being torn open is audible, followed by a subtle pouring sound. The narrator's voice remains dominant and assertive. The spectral brightness of the audio is high, with clear high-frequency detail in both the voice and the percussive elements of the BGM. (6) A cheerful 'tada' or chime sound effect rings out as the green gift box is revealed. The narrator's tone becomes more playful and excited. The background music continues without interruption, maintaining a consistent harmonic tension that builds toward the conclusion of the promotional segment. (7) Soft chewing and swallowing sounds are recorded as she eats the gummy. A comedic 'crunch' or exaggerated chewing sound effect is added for emphasis. The BGM swells slightly in volume during the final call to action, where the narrator speaks with maximum confidence and projection.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem Identification -> Solution Introduction -> Product Demonstration -> Social Proof -> Promotion/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy promotional advertisement for Phytics probiotics, specifically targeting women in Taiwan. It uses a relatable 'health checklist' to identify common feminine health issues and positions the 'Phytics Yellow' and 'Phytics Red' products as essential solutions popular in Korea. The content blends personal testimonial, product demonstration, and limited-time offer messaging to drive viewer engagement and sales.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of Phytics probiotics with pricing info, purchase links, and promotional gifts.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is professionally edited for short-form social media consumption, utilizing high-density text overlays and synchronized sound effects to maintain high viewer retention.
